AI.summary: Google is launching a new Gemini app on Mac that allows you to interact with the AI assistant without switching windows on your desktop. With the app, you can use the Option + Space shortcut to pull up a floating chat bubble, where you can ask Gemini questions and share your window. Before sharing y…

AI.title: Allbirds announced a switch from shoes to AI and its stock jumped 600 percent
AI.summary: Allbirds had a hit a decade ago with its Wool Runner shoes, but after a $4 billion IPO in 2021, the business never turned a profit, and sales dropped nearly 50 percent between 2022 and 2025. The company recently announced it would sell off its name and assets for $39 million to American Exchange aft…

AI.title: Adobe embraces conversational AI editing, marking a ‘fundamental shift’ in creative work
AI.summary: Adobe is fully embracing AI tools that enable creators to edit their work using descriptive prompts, instead of manually using specific Creative Cloud apps. The software giant's new Firefly AI Assistant allows users to describe what they want to change by typing their own words into a conversational…

AI.title: Grok’s sexual deepfakes almost got it banned from Apple’s App Store. Almost.
AI.summary: Apple quietly threatened to kick Elon Musk's AI app, Grok, from its App Store in January over its failure to curb the surge of nonconsensual sexual deepfakes flooding X, according to NBC News. AI.title: AI Could Democratize One of Tech's Most Valuable Resources
AI.summary: AI is making it easier to design chips and optimize software for different silicon. Some startups envision a revolution in chipmaking.

AI.title: Allbirds Is Pivoting to AI Compute. Sure, Why Not
AI.summary: Once a $4 billion apparel juggernaut, Allbirds will rebrand as NewBird AI, a “GPU-as-a-Service” company. Hey, if you can't beat ’em, join ’em.

AI.title: AI Slop Is Making the Internet Fake-Happy
AI.summary: A new study examines the impact of the rise of AI-generated websites on the internet—and found some surprising results.

AI.title: The Deepfake Nudes Crisis in Schools Is Much Worse Than You Thought
AI.summary: An analysis by WIRED and Indicator found nearly 90 schools and 600 students around the world impacted by AI-generated deepfake nude images—and the problem shows no signs of going away.

游戏.title: Universal Pictures at CinemaCon 2026: Everything Revealed
游戏.summary: From Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey to Steven Spielberg's Disclosure Day, these were the big movie reveals from Universal Pictures' CinemaCon 2026 presentation.

游戏.title: Belkin Releases a Wireless Mic and Tripod Starter Set for New Creators
游戏.summary: Belkin has announced the Stage Creator Kit, a bundled collection of creator-focused hardware that includes a telescoping tripod, a magnetic phone holder, and Belkin's compact set of two clip-on, wireless microphones, and a USB-C receiver.

游戏.title: Coyote vs. Acme Poster Revealed Alongside Cheeky Trailer Announcement
游戏.summary: A worldwide theatrical run of Coyote vs. Acme is still happening, and we have the key art reveal to prove it. The film’s first poster has been released ahead of its inevitably, highly anticipated release this summer.

游戏.title: Popeyes x One Piece Bento Boxes Are Already Being Resold on eBay for Hundreds of Dollars
游戏.summary: Popeyes and One Piece have collaborated on a special menu and range of collectibles that have already taken the internet by storm. In fact, a special One Piece Bento Box given away for free to select customers is already being resold on eBay for hundreds of dollars.

游戏.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day LEGO Set Reveals Key Fight
游戏.summary: LEGO has unveiled a range of sets based on Spider-Man: Brand New Day, one of which appears to be setting up a key fight.

游戏.title: Target Announces Massive Pokémon Anniversary Collection for "Fans of Every Generation"
游戏.summary: Target is the first US-based mass retailer to announce an anniversary collection with The Pokémon Company.

游戏.title: Fortnite Adds Karaoke Mode, and Laufey
游戏.summary: Fortnite is adding microphone vocals to its Rock Band-like Festival mode, just in time for a new season featuring jazz pop star Laufey.

游戏.title: Margot Robbie Confirms Ocean's Eleven Prequel
游戏.summary: Get ready to heist again, because Margot Robbie has confirmed the premise and the setting for the upcoming Ocean’s Eleven prequel film during an appearance at CinemaCon.

游戏.title: Pokémon Go Fans Use Government Maps to Hunt Snakes
游戏.summary: Pokémon Go fans are wrestling with U.S. government geographic data to find a newly-released creature: Silicobra, the sand snake Pokémon.

游戏.title: Jacksepticeye Comments on Bloodborne Movie
游戏.summary: YouTuber Jacksepticeye has admitted his involvement with the just-announced Bloodborne animated movie comes as a surprise, but has insisted he’s taking his producer role incredibly seriously, and will “fight so hard to make this amazing.”

游戏.title: Pokémon Card Release Marred by Violence
游戏.summary: Costco shoppers have been caught up in violence after an early morning release of Pokémon cards resulted in police intervention.

游戏.title: Marathon Update Reaction
游戏.summary: It looks like Bungie's attempts to make Marathon a little more casual-friendly are helping.

游戏.title: Next God of War Features Multiple Mythologies — Report
游戏.summary: History buffs can reportedly look forward to multiple mythologies appearing in the next God of War from Sony Santa Monica.

游戏.title: PS5 Hardware Sales Spike
游戏.summary: Last month's announcement of a big PlayStation 5 price rise caused sales of console hardware to spike, with customers looking to buy ahead of the price increase kicking in.

科技.title: Amazon-backed X-energy files to raise up to $800M in IPO
科技.summary: Nuclear startup X-energy hit the road today to sell prospective investors on its initial public offering.

科技.title: Ford EV and tech chief leaving automaker
科技.summary: Doug Field had stints at Apple and Tesla before joining Ford in 2021.

科技.title: Wait, could they still actually break up Live Nation?
科技.summary: A federal jury found that Live Nation has acted illegally as a monopoly -- but the company just came to a tentative settlement with the DOJ last month.

科技.title: Monarch Tractor’s collapse ends with an acquisition by Caterpillar
科技.summary: The startup had faced mounting pressure from dealers, farmers, and a co-founder who complained that Monarch's tech didn't work properly.

科技.summary: OpenAI has expanded the capabilities of its agent-building toolkit, as agentic AI continues to grow in popularity.

科技.title: Hightouch reaches $100M ARR fueled by marketing tools powered by AI
科技.summary: The startup says it grew its ARR by $70 million in just 20 months after launching an AI agent platform for marketers.

科技.title: LinkedIn data shows AI isn’t to blame for hiring decline… yet
科技.summary: LinkedIn says hiring is down 20% since 2022, but blames higher interest rates — not AI — for the slowdown.

科技.title: Feds will require data centers to show their power bills
科技.summary: In a first, the U.S. Energy Information Agency said it will require data centers to disclose details of their energy use.

科技.title: AI learning app Gizmo levels up with 13M users and a $22M investment
科技.summary: Gizmo, an AI-powered learning platform, has attracted more than 13 million users and just secured $22 million in Series A funding.

科技.title: Can AI judge journalism? A Thiel-backed startup says yes, even if it risks chilling whistleblowers
科技.summary: Objection, a Thiel-backed startup, aims to use AI to judge journalism, letting users pay to challenge stories. Critics warn it could chill whistleblowers and reshape how media accountability works.

科技.title: Google rolls out a native Gemini app for Mac
科技.summary: You can share anything on their screen with Gemini to get help with what they're looking at in the moment, including local files.

科技.title: This Khosla-backed autonomous pod startup just raised $170M — now it’s aiming for more
科技.summary: Glydways is in talks to raise another $250 million as it prepares to launch three pilot programs.

科技.title: Accel raises $5B to back late-stage bets
科技.summary: Accel announced on Tuesday that it raised $5 billion in fresh capital to back late-stage companies building AI.

科技.title: India’s vibe-coding startup Emergent enters OpenClaw-like AI agent space
科技.summary: Emergent's Wingman lets users manage and automate tasks through chat on platforms like WhatsApp and Telegram.

科技.title: Anthropic shrugs off VC funding offers valuing it at $800B+, for now
科技.summary: VCs are frothing at the mouth to write more checks to Anthropic at a valuation that matches or beats OpenAI's.

金融市场.summary: The central bank official advocated a patient approach as officials watch incoming data for clues about where the U.S. economy is heading.

金融市场.summary: Though most Fed chairs in the past have left after being replaced, Powell has demurred on what he plans to do.
